creator: you.akira.noda@gmail.com
text:
I can not fetch OpenCV-2.3.1.tar.bz2 from original site(source forge) ,because size is not match.

Original site's OpenCV-2.3.1.tar.bz2 was updated from ports version.But the file name is same.
(Some comments and file name of #include<> changed)

Fix: 

change distinfo file for latest one.
like this

SIZE (OpenCV-2.3.1.tar.bz2) = 32669613
SHA256 (OpenCV-2.3.1.tar.bz2) = a9a2f529101c04eb2b606eee8c80f3ad93190b36f91ac09ee0ec5aa1eed1450c
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/opencv
make
